# Discord RP Citation Bot - Setup Instructions

## Project Overview
Discord bot for RP citations with dropdown menus to select broken laws, automatic fine calculation, and bank money deduction.

## Steps

- [x] Verify copilot-instructions.md exists
- [ ] Scaffold Discord bot project structure
- [ ] Create citation system files and commands
- [ ] Install dependencies
- [ ] Create database schema for laws and citations
- [ ] Test and verify setup

## Notes
- Using discord.py for Discord interactions
- SQLite database for laws and player data
- Dropdown menus using Discord Select components
